name: Spanreed (1 pair)
description: A pair of conjoined writing reeds for long-distance communication.

fabrialProperties.effect: Allows written communication over long distances. Expends 1 charge per 5 days.

name: Heatrial
description: A heating fabrial for warmth or cooking.

fabrialProperties.effect: Generates heat. Expends 1 charge per day for ambient warmth, or per hour for cooking.

name: Soulcaster
description: A fabrial that can transform materials into one specific Essence.

fabrialProperties.effect: Allows use of Transformation surge to convert materials to one Essence type.
